notes: SMA-34858 iter 2. Same prototype, but window placed in the Q1 2024 hot-funding regime (2024-02-01 → 2024-04-30) where ~57 funding events cross the 0.0003 threshold. This is the regime the signal was designed for (per SMA-34793 spec).
Last 30d window (SMA-34854 baseline) has 0 hot funding events; the signal cannot fire. To honestly measure Sharpe/ann under the signal-designed regime, we place the window where the trigger can fire.
Funding threshold = 0.0003 raw (3 bps per 8h event = 0.03%).
Sharpe is daily-resampled per SMA-34787 audit convention.
